MetSigDB benchmark (v4)

Jannik Franken

Heidelberg University
  • 1 Purpose
  • 2 Libraries and package loading
  • 3 Benchmark implementation (v4)
  • 4 Resource grouping
  • 5 Exclusion effect (counts and deltas)
  • 6 Test 1: Resource level summary
  • 7 Test 2: Term size distribution
  • 8 Test 3: Target membership buckets
  • 9 Export summary
  • 10 References
  • 11 Session information

1 Purpose

This benchmark summarizes size, structure, and hub entities across MetSigDB prior-knowledge resources, including KEGG (Kanehisa et al. 2017), Reactome (Milacic et al. 2024), WikiPathways (Agrawal et al. 2024), ClassyFire (Djoumbou Feunang et al. 2016), MetaLinksDB (Farr et al. 2024), and MACdb (Sun et al. 2023), plus the merged make_gene_metab_set() resource.

ID harmonization and mapping infrastructure used by the resource functions are informed by RaMP-DB 2.0 (Braisted et al. 2023) and OmnipathR-integrated knowledge workflows (Turei et al. 2021).

This version also benchmarks the effect of metabolite exclusion (exclude_metabolites) and then runs the full benchmark with exclusion enabled by default.

2 Libraries and package loading

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(tibble)
  library(knitr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
  library(openxlsx)
  library(svglite)
  library(ggbreak)
})

if (!exists("metsigdb_kegg", mode = "function")) {
  if (requireNamespace("MetaProViz", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(MetaProViz))
  } else {
    stop(
      "Function `metsigdb_kegg` is unavailable and package `MetaProViz` is not installed. ",
      "Install MetaProViz or load the required functions before knitting."
    )
  }
}

if (!requireNamespace("ggbreak", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Package `ggbreak` is required for the split y-axis footprint plot. Please install it first.")
}

3 Benchmark implementation (v4)

#Establish needed functions:
metsigdb_groups <- function() {
  tibble::tribble(
    ~resource,                  ~group,
    "metsigdb_kegg",            "Pathway resources",
    "metsigdb_reactome",        "Pathway resources",
    "metsigdb_wikipathways",    "Pathway resources",
    "metsigdb_chemicalclass",   "Annotation resources",
    "metsigdb_metalinks",       "Interaction resources",
    "metsigdb_metalinks__other_protein_metabolite", "Interaction resources",
    "metsigdb_metalinks__transporter_metabolite",   "Interaction resources",
    "metsigdb_metalinks__receptor_metabolite",      "Interaction resources",
    "metsigdb_metalinks__enzyme_metabolite",        "Interaction resources",
    "metsigdb_macdb",                                 "Cancer association resources",
    #"make_gene_metab_set_merged","Derived pathway resources"
    "metsigdb_hallmarks", "Derived pathway resources",
    "metsigdb_gaude_pathways", "Derived pathway resources"
  )
}

expand_metalinks_resources <- function(df) {
  df <- tibble::as_tibble(df)
  family_col <- "interaction_family"
  allowed_families <- c(
    "Other protein-metabolite",
    "Transporter-metabolite",
    "Receptor-metabolite",
    "Enzyme-metabolite"
  )

  if (!family_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("`metsigdb_metalinks` output must contain `interaction_family`.")
  }

  unknown <- unique(df[[family_col]][!df[[family_col]] %in% allowed_families])
  unknown <- unknown[!is.na(unknown)]
  if (length(unknown) > 0L || any(is.na(df[[family_col]]))) {
    stop(
      "`interaction_family` contains missing or unexpected values. Allowed values are: ",
      paste(allowed_families, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  list(
    metsigdb_metalinks = df,
    metsigdb_metalinks__other_protein_metabolite =
      dplyr::filter(df, interaction_family == "Other protein-metabolite"),
    metsigdb_metalinks__transporter_metabolite =
      dplyr::filter(df, interaction_family == "Transporter-metabolite"),
    metsigdb_metalinks__receptor_metabolite =
      dplyr::filter(df, interaction_family == "Receptor-metabolite"),
    metsigdb_metalinks__enzyme_metabolite =
      dplyr::filter(df, interaction_family == "Enzyme-metabolite")
  )
}

fetch_metsigdb_hallmarks <- function(exclude_metabolites = "all") {
  data("hallmarks", package = "MetaProViz")

  make_gene_metab_set(
    input_pk = hallmarks,
    metadata_info = c(Target = "gene"),
    pk_name = "hallmarks",
    save_table = NULL,
    exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites
  )$GeneMetabSet %>%
    mutate(
      gene_metab_source = "hallmarks",
      interaction_type = if_else(grepl("^HMDB", feature), "pathway-metabolite", "pathway-metabolic_enzyme")
    )
}

fetch_metsigdb_gaude_pathways <- function(exclude_metabolites = "all") {
  data("gaude_pathways", package = "MetaProViz")

  make_gene_metab_set(
    input_pk = gaude_pathways,
    metadata_info = c(Target = "gene"),
    pk_name = "gaude_pathways",
    save_table = NULL,
    exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites
  )$GeneMetabSet %>%
    mutate(
      gene_metab_source = "gaude_pathways",
      interaction_type = if_else(grepl("^HMDB", feature), "pathway-metabolite", "pathway-metabolic_enzyme")
    )
}

fetch_wikipathways_from_csv <- function(exclude_metabolites = "all") {
  csv_file <- if (is.null(exclude_metabolites)) {
    "wikipathways_all_species_long.csv"
  } else {
    "wikipathways_all_species_excluded_long.csv"
  }

  if (!file.exists(csv_file)) {
    stop("WikiPathways CSV not found: ", csv_file)
  }

  wp <- utils::read.csv(csv_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble()

  required_base <- c("pathway_id", "pathway_name")
  missing_base <- setdiff(required_base, names(wp))
  if (length(missing_base) > 0L) {
    stop(
      "WikiPathways CSV is missing required columns: ",
      paste(missing_base, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  if ("metabolite_id" %in% names(wp)) {
    wp_long <- wp
  } else if ("metabolites" %in% names(wp)) {
    wp_long <- wp %>%
      tidyr::separate_rows(metabolites, sep = ";\\s*") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(metabolites = trimws(metabolites)) %>%
      dplyr::rename(metabolite_id = metabolites)
  } else {
    stop("WikiPathways CSV must contain either `metabolite_id` or `metabolites`.")
  }

  wp_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(metabolite_id), metabolite_id != "")
}

normalize_wikipathways_id_columns <- function(raw_id) {
  id <- as.character(raw_id)

  chebi <- dplyr::if_else(
    grepl("^CHEBI[:_][0-9]+$", id, ignore.case = TRUE),
    paste0("CHEBI:", sub("(?i)^CHEBI[:_]([0-9]+)$", "\\1", id, perl = TRUE)),
    NA_character_
  )

  pubchem <- dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("^CID[0-9]+$", id, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ sub("(?i)^CID", "", id, perl = TRUE),
    grepl("^PUBCHEM(?:\\.COMPOUND)?[:_][0-9]+$", id, ignore.case = TRUE) ~
      sub("(?i)^PUBCHEM(?:\\.COMPOUND)?[:_]([0-9]+)$", "\\1", id, perl = TRUE),
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  hmdb <- dplyr::if_else(grepl("^HMDB[0-9]+$", id, ignore.case = TRUE), id, NA_character_)

  tibble::tibble(metabolite_id = hmdb, chebi_id = chebi, pubchem = pubchem)
}

standardise_metsigdb <- function(df, resource, groups_tbl) {
  df <- tibble::as_tibble(df)

  if (resource == "metsigdb_chemicalclass") {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Annotation resources",
      term_id = as.character(ClassyFire_class),
      term_name = as.character(ClassyFire_class),
      target_id = as.character(class_source_id),
      target_type = "metabolite-annotation",
      metabolite_id = as.character(class_source_id),
      chebi_id = NA_character_,
      pubchem = NA_character_,
      metabolite_name = as.character(common_name),
      source_dataset = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  if (resource == "metsigdb_kegg") {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Pathway resources",
      term_id = as.character(Description),
      term_name = as.character(term),
      target_id = as.character(MetaboliteID),
      target_type = "pathway-metabolite",
      metabolite_id = as.character(MetaboliteID),
      chebi_id = NA_character_,
      pubchem = as.character(pubchem),
      metabolite_name = as.character(Metabolite),
      source_dataset = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  if (resource == "metsigdb_reactome") {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Pathway resources",
      term_id = as.character(pathway_id),
      term_name = as.character(pathway_name),
      target_id = as.character(chebi_id),
      target_type = "pathway-metabolite",
      metabolite_id = as.character(chebi_id),
      chebi_id = as.character(chebi_id),
      pubchem = NA_character_,
      metabolite_name = NA_character_,
      source_dataset = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  if (resource == "metsigdb_wikipathways") {
    wp_ids <- normalize_wikipathways_id_columns(df$metabolite_id)
    return(df %>%
      transmute(
        resource = resource,
        group = "Pathway resources",
        term_id = as.character(pathway_id),
        term_name = as.character(pathway_name),
        target_id = as.character(metabolite_id),
        target_type = "pathway-metabolite",
        metabolite_name = NA_character_,
        source_dataset = NA_character_
      ) %>%
      bind_cols(wp_ids %>% select(metabolite_id, chebi_id, pubchem)))
  }

  if (resource == "metsigdb_metalinks" || grepl("^metsigdb_metalinks__", resource)) {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Interaction resources",
      term_id = as.character(uniprot),
      term_name = as.character(gene_symbol),
      target_id = as.character(hmdb),
      target_type = "metabolite-protein",
      metabolite_id = as.character(hmdb),
      chebi_id = NA_character_,
      pubchem = as.character(pubchem),
      metabolite_name = as.character(metabolite),
      source_dataset = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  if (resource == "metsigdb_macdb") {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Cancer association resources",
      term_id = as.character(term),
      term_name = dplyr::if_else(is.na(Description) | Description == "", as.character(term), as.character(Description)),
      target_id = as.character(Metabolite_PubchemID),
      target_type = "metabolite-cancer",
      metabolite_id = NA_character_,
      chebi_id = NA_character_,
      pubchem = as.character(Metabolite_PubchemID),
      metabolite_name = as.character(Metabolite),
      source_dataset = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  if (resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways")) {
    return(df %>% transmute(
      resource = resource,
      group = "Derived pathway resources",
      term_id = as.character(term),
      term_name = as.character(term),
      target_id = as.character(feature),
      target_type = as.character(interaction_type),
      metabolite_id = if_else(grepl("^HMDB", feature), as.character(feature), NA_character_),
      chebi_id = NA_character_,
      pubchem = NA_character_,
      metabolite_name = NA_character_,
      source_dataset = as.character(gene_metab_source)
    ))
  }

  stop("Unsupported resource: ", resource)
}

resource_level_metrics <- function(edges) {
  edges %>%
    distinct(resource, group, target_type, term_id, target_id) %>%
    group_by(resource, group, target_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n_terms = n_distinct(term_id),
      n_targets = n_distinct(target_id),
      n_interactions = n(),
      avg_targets_per_term = n_interactions / n_terms,
      avg_terms_per_target = n_interactions / n_targets,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

set_level_metrics <- function(edges) {
  edges %>%
    distinct(resource, group, target_type, term_id, term_name, target_id) %>%
    count(resource, group, target_type, term_id, term_name, name = "n_targets_in_term") %>%
    group_by(resource, group, target_type) %>%
    summarise(
      min_targets = min(n_targets_in_term, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_targets = median(n_targets_in_term, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_targets = mean(n_targets_in_term, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_targets = max(n_targets_in_term, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

target_degree_buckets <- function(edges) {
  edges %>%
    distinct(resource, group, target_type, target_id, term_id) %>%
    count(resource, group, target_type, target_id, name = "degree") %>%
    mutate(
      degree_bucket = case_when(
        degree == 1 ~ "in 1 term",
        degree == 2 ~ "in 2 terms",
        degree > 2  ~ "in >2 terms",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    count(resource, group, target_type, degree_bucket, name = "n_targets") %>%
    group_by(resource, group, target_type) %>%
    mutate(pct_targets = n_targets / sum(n_targets)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

benchmark_metsigdb <- function(
  reactome_species = NULL,
  wikipathways_species = NULL,
  exclude_metabolites = "all"
) {
  groups_tbl <- metsigdb_groups()

  raw_base <- list(
    metsigdb_chemicalclass = metsigdb_chemicalclass(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    metsigdb_kegg = metsigdb_kegg(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    metsigdb_reactome = metsigdb_reactome(species = reactome_species, exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    # Temporary local fallback: species argument is ignored while WikiPathways API is unavailable.
    metsigdb_wikipathways = fetch_wikipathways_from_csv(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    # metsigdb_wikipathways = metsigdb_wikipathways(species = wikipathways_species, exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    metsigdb_macdb = metsigdb_macdb(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    metsigdb_hallmarks = fetch_metsigdb_hallmarks(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites),
    metsigdb_gaude_pathways = fetch_metsigdb_gaude_pathways(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites)
  )

  metalinks_expanded <- expand_metalinks_resources(
    metsigdb_metalinks(exclude_metabolites = exclude_metabolites)
  )

  raw <- c(raw_base, metalinks_expanded)

  edges <- purrr::imap(raw, ~ standardise_metsigdb(.x, .y, groups_tbl = groups_tbl)) %>%
    bind_rows()

  list(
    edges = edges,
    resource_level = resource_level_metrics(edges),
    set_level = set_level_metrics(edges),
    degree_buckets = target_degree_buckets(edges)
  )
}

format_resource_level <- function(tbl) {
  tbl %>%
    transmute(
      Resource = resource,
      `Resource Group` = group,
      `Interaction Type` = target_type,
      `Distinct Terms` = n_terms,
      `Distinct Targets` = n_targets,
      `Distinct Interactions` = n_interactions,
      `Avg Targets per Term` = avg_targets_per_term,
      `Avg Terms per Target` = avg_terms_per_target
    )
}

format_set_level <- function(tbl) {
  tbl %>%
    transmute(
      Resource = resource,
      `Resource Group` = group,
      `Interaction Type` = target_type,
      `Min Targets per Term` = min_targets,
      `Median Targets per Term` = median_targets,
      `Mean Targets per Term` = mean_targets,
      `Max Targets per Term` = max_targets
    )
}

format_degree_buckets <- function(tbl) {
  tbl %>%
    transmute(
      Resource = resource,
      `Resource Group` = group,
      `Interaction Type` = target_type,
      `Membership Bucket` = degree_bucket,
      `Number of Targets` = n_targets,
      `Share of Targets` = pct_targets
    )
}
output_root <- file.path(getwd(), "benchmark_results")
run_stamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
run_dir <- file.path(output_root, paste0("metsigdb_benchmark_", run_stamp))
plots_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "plots")

for (d in c(output_root, run_dir, plots_dir)) {
  if (!dir.exists(d)) dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE)
}

excel_file <- file.path(run_dir, paste0("metsigdb_benchmark_", run_stamp, ".xlsx"))

save_svg_plot <- function(plot_obj, filename, width = 12, height = 6) {
  out_file <- file.path(plots_dir, filename)
  if (!dir.exists(plots_dir)) dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = out_file,
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    device = svglite::svglite
  )

  if (!file.exists(out_file)) {
    stop("Failed to save plot: ", out_file)
  }

  out_file
}

write_sheet_data <- function(wb, sheet_name, data_tbl) {
  openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
  openxlsx::writeData(wb, sheet_name, data_tbl)
  openxlsx::freezePane(wb, sheet_name, firstRow = TRUE)
}

interaction_type_colors <- c(
  "pathway-metabolite" = "#1F78B4",
  "metabolite-protein" = "#E66101",
  "pathway-metabolic_enzyme" = "#33A02C",
  "metabolite-cancer" = "#E31A1C",
  "metabolite-annotation" = "#7570B3"
)
res_no_excl <- benchmark_metsigdb(
  reactome_species = NULL,
  wikipathways_species = NULL,
  exclude_metabolites = NULL
)

res_default_excl <- benchmark_metsigdb(
  reactome_species = NULL,
  wikipathways_species = NULL,
  exclude_metabolites = "all"
)

res <- res_default_excl

tbl_resource_groups <- metsigdb_groups() %>%
  rename(Resource = resource, `Resource Group` = group) %>%
  arrange(`Resource Group`, Resource)

tbl_exclusion_compare <- bind_rows(
  res_no_excl$resource_level %>% mutate(exclusion_mode = "none"),
  res_default_excl$resource_level %>% mutate(exclusion_mode = "default_all")
) %>%
  select(resource, group, target_type, exclusion_mode, n_terms, n_targets, n_interactions) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = exclusion_mode,
    values_from = c(n_terms, n_targets, n_interactions)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_terms = n_terms_default_all - n_terms_none,
    delta_targets = n_targets_default_all - n_targets_none,
    delta_interactions = n_interactions_default_all - n_interactions_none,
    pct_delta_targets = if_else(n_targets_none > 0, delta_targets / n_targets_none, NA_real_),
    pct_delta_interactions = if_else(n_interactions_none > 0, delta_interactions / n_interactions_none, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Resource = resource,
    `Resource Group` = group,
    `Interaction Type` = target_type,
    `Terms (No Exclusion)` = n_terms_none,
    `Terms (Default Exclusion)` = n_terms_default_all,
    `Delta Terms` = delta_terms,
    `Targets (No Exclusion)` = n_targets_none,
    `Targets (Default Exclusion)` = n_targets_default_all,
    `Delta Targets` = delta_targets,
    `% Delta Targets` = pct_delta_targets,
    `Interactions (No Exclusion)` = n_interactions_none,
    `Interactions (Default Exclusion)` = n_interactions_default_all,
    `Delta Interactions` = delta_interactions,
    `% Delta Interactions` = pct_delta_interactions
  ) %>%
  arrange(`Resource Group`, Resource, `Interaction Type`)

tbl_resource_level <- format_resource_level(res$resource_level) %>%
  arrange(`Resource Group`, Resource, `Interaction Type`)

tbl_set_level <- format_set_level(res$set_level) %>%
  arrange(`Resource Group`, Resource, `Interaction Type`)

tbl_degree_buckets <- format_degree_buckets(res$degree_buckets) %>%
  arrange(`Resource Group`, Resource, `Interaction Type`, `Membership Bucket`)
interaction_type_order <- c(
  "pathway-metabolite",
  "pathway-metabolic_enzyme",
  "metabolite-protein",
  "metabolite-cancer",
  "metabolite-annotation")

metric_colors <- c(
  `Distinct Terms` = "blue",
  `Distinct Targets` = "red",
  `Distinct Interactions` = "purple"
)

resource_order_tbl <- tbl_resource_level %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource)
  ) %>%
  distinct(ResourcePlot, `Interaction Type`) %>%
  arrange(`Interaction Type`)

resource_plot_levels <- as.character(resource_order_tbl$ResourcePlot)
resource_label_colors <- unname(interaction_type_colors[as.character(resource_order_tbl$`Interaction Type`)])
interaction_type_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(`Interaction Type` = factor(interaction_type_order, levels = interaction_type_order))

# Grouped bar: exclusion deltas for targets.
delta_targets_plot_data <- tbl_exclusion_compare %>%
  filter(!is.na(`% Delta Targets`)) %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    value = `% Delta Targets`,
    label = scales::percent(value, accuracy = 0.1),
    label_y = value + if_else(value >= 0, 0.03, -0.03),
    line_y = value + if_else(value >= 0, 0.02, -0.02),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource),
    ResourcePlot = factor(ResourcePlot, levels = resource_plot_levels)
  )

mpv_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.box.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

p_delta_targets <- ggplot(delta_targets_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = value, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      xend = ResourcePlot,
      y = value,
      yend = line_y,
      group = `Interaction Type`
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    linewidth = 0.3,
    color = "grey35"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(y = label_y, label = label, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    size = 2.7,
    vjust = ifelse(delta_targets_plot_data$value >= 0, 0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative Change in Targets After Default Exclusion",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "% Delta Targets",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

# Grouped bar: exclusion deltas for interactions.
delta_interactions_plot_data <- tbl_exclusion_compare %>%
  filter(!is.na(`% Delta Interactions`)) %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    value = `% Delta Interactions`,
    label = scales::percent(value, accuracy = 0.1),
    label_y = value + if_else(value >= 0, 0.03, -0.03),
    line_y = value + if_else(value >= 0, 0.02, -0.02),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource),
    ResourcePlot = factor(ResourcePlot, levels = resource_plot_levels)
  )

p_delta_interactions <- ggplot(delta_interactions_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = value, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      xend = ResourcePlot,
      y = value,
      yend = line_y,
      group = `Interaction Type`
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    linewidth = 0.3,
    color = "grey35"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(y = label_y, label = label, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    size = 2.7,
    vjust = ifelse(delta_interactions_plot_data$value >= 0, 0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative Change in Interactions After Default Exclusion",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "% Delta Interactions",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

# Grouped and faceted footprint plot.
resource_footprint_plot_data <- tbl_resource_level %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource),
    ResourcePlot = factor(ResourcePlot, levels = resource_plot_levels)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(`Distinct Terms`, `Distinct Targets`, `Distinct Interactions`),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  group_by(ResourcePlot) %>%
  mutate(
    stack_total = sum(Value),
    stack_share = if_else(stack_total > 0, Value / stack_total, 0),
    ValueLabel = if_else(stack_share >= 0.04, scales::comma(Value), NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

p_resource_footprint <- ggplot(resource_footprint_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = Value, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = Value, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    vjust = -0.15,
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Resource Footprint Across Terms, Targets, and Interactions",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

p_resource_footprint_stacked <- ggplot(
  resource_footprint_plot_data,
  aes(
    x = ResourcePlot,
    y = Value,
    fill = Metric
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    position = "stack",
    width = 0.8,
    color = "grey35"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = Value,
      group = interaction(`Interaction Type`, Metric)
    ),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 2.4,
    color = "black",
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = interaction_type_legend_df,
    aes(x = resource_plot_levels[1], y = 0, color = `Interaction Type`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0,
    size = 0.1,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = metric_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1),
    color = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 3))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Stacked Resource Footprint Across Terms, Targets, and Interactions",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Metric",
    color = "Interaction Type (x-axis labels)"
  ) +
  mpv_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, color = resource_label_colors))
resource_footprint_stacked_totals <- resource_footprint_plot_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ResourcePlot) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(TotalValue = sum(Value), .groups = "drop")

p_resource_footprint_stacked_split <- p_resource_footprint_stacked +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(c(1500, 30000), scales = 25 / 70, space = 1) +
  labs(title = "Stacked Resource Footprint Across Terms, Targets, and Interactions (Y-axis split)")

# Same footprint plot with a y-axis break to improve visibility of lower bars.
p_resource_footprint_split <- ggplot(resource_footprint_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = Value, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = Value, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    vjust = -0.15,
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(c(4000, 14000), scales = 25 / 70, space = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Resource Footprint Across Terms, Targets, and Interactions (Y-axis split)",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

make_resource_footprint_split_single <- function(metric_name, break_start, break_end) {
  resource_footprint_plot_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(Metric == metric_name) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = Value, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = Value, group = `Interaction Type`),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
      vjust = -0.15,
      size = 2.6
    ) +
    ggbreak::scale_y_break(c(break_start, break_end), scales = 25 / 70, space = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(metric_name, " by Resource (Y-axis split)"),
      x = "Resource",
      y = "Count",
      fill = "Interaction Type"
    ) +
    mpv_theme
}

p_resource_footprint_terms_split <- make_resource_footprint_split_single(
  metric_name = "Distinct Terms",
  break_start = 4000,
  break_end = 15000
)

p_resource_footprint_targets_split <- make_resource_footprint_split_single(
  metric_name = "Distinct Targets",
  break_start = 8000,
  break_end = 40000
)

p_resource_footprint_interactions_split <- make_resource_footprint_split_single(
  metric_name = "Distinct Interactions",
  break_start = 25000,
  break_end = 40000
)

# Grouped bar: mean targets per term.
set_level_plot_data <- tbl_set_level %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    mean_label = round(`Mean Targets per Term`, 2),
    median_label = round(`Median Targets per Term`, 2),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource),
    ResourcePlot = factor(ResourcePlot, levels = resource_plot_levels)
  )

p_set_level_mean <- ggplot(set_level_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = `Mean Targets per Term`, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = mean_label, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    vjust = -0.15,
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Targets per Term by Resource",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Mean Targets per Term",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

# Grouped bar: median targets per term.
p_set_level_median <- ggplot(set_level_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = `Median Targets per Term`, fill = `Interaction Type`)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = median_label, group = `Interaction Type`),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    vjust = -0.15,
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Targets per Term by Resource",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Median Targets per Term",
    fill = "Interaction Type"
  ) +
  mpv_theme

# Stacked bar: membership composition.
degree_bucket_plot_data <- tbl_degree_buckets %>%
  mutate(
    `Interaction Type` = factor(`Interaction Type`, levels = interaction_type_order),
    `Membership Bucket` = factor(`Membership Bucket`, levels = c("in 1 term", "in 2 terms", "in >2 terms")),
    `Share Label` = scales::percent(`Share of Targets`, accuracy = 0.1),
    ResourcePlot = if_else(Resource %in% c("metsigdb_hallmarks", "metsigdb_gaude_pathways"), paste0(Resource, "\n", `Interaction Type`), Resource),
    ResourcePlot = factor(ResourcePlot, levels = resource_plot_levels)
  )

p_degree_bucket <- ggplot(degree_bucket_plot_data, aes(x = ResourcePlot, y = `Share of Targets`, fill = `Membership Bucket`)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = `Share Label`),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 2.6,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = interaction_type_legend_df,
    aes(x = resource_plot_levels[1], y = 0, color = `Interaction Type`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0,
    size = 0.1,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = interaction_type_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1),
    color = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 3))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Target Membership Composition per Resource",
    x = "Resource",
    y = "Share of Targets",
    fill = "Membership Bucket",
    color = "Interaction Type (x-axis labels)"
  ) +
  mpv_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, color = resource_label_colors))

if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Package `gridExtra` is required for the combined footprint-degree plot. Please install it first.")
}

stacked_split_grob <- grid::grid.grabExpr(print(p_resource_footprint_stacked_split))
degree_bucket_grob <- grid::grid.grabExpr(print(p_degree_bucket))

p_resource_degree_combined <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(
  stacked_split_grob,
  degree_bucket_grob,
  ncol = 2
)

plot_manifest <- tibble::tibble(
  Plot = c(
    "Relative Change in Targets",
    "Relative Change in Interactions",
    "Resource Footprint",
    "Stacked Resource Footprint",
    "Stacked Resource Footprint (Y-axis split)",
    "Resource Footprint (Y-axis split)",
    "Distinct Terms by Resource (Y-axis split)",
    "Distinct Targets by Resource (Y-axis split)",
    "Distinct Interactions by Resource (Y-axis split)",
    "Average Targets per Term",
    "Median Targets per Term",
    "Membership Composition",
    "Combined Footprint and Membership"
  ),
  PlotObject = list(
    p_delta_targets,
    p_delta_interactions,
    p_resource_footprint,
    p_resource_footprint_stacked,
    p_resource_footprint_stacked_split,
    p_resource_footprint_split,
    p_resource_footprint_terms_split,
    p_resource_footprint_targets_split,
    p_resource_footprint_interactions_split,
    p_set_level_mean,
    p_set_level_median,
    p_degree_bucket,
    p_resource_degree_combined
  ),
  SVG_File = c(
    "exclusion_pct_delta_targets.svg",
    "exclusion_pct_delta_interactions.svg",
    "resource_footprint_faceted.svg",
    "resource_footprint_stacked.svg",
    "resource_footprint_stacked_split.svg",
    "resource_footprint_faceted_split.svg",
    "resource_footprint_terms_split.svg",
    "resource_footprint_targets_split.svg",
    "resource_footprint_interactions_split.svg",
    "set_level_mean_targets.svg",
    "set_level_median_targets.svg",
    "degree_bucket_composition.svg",
    "resource_degree_combined.svg"
  ),
  Width = c(13, 13, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 13, 13, 13, 27),
  Height = c(6, 6, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 6, 6, 7, 8)
)

plot_files <- purrr::pmap_chr(
  plot_manifest[c("PlotObject", "SVG_File", "Width", "Height")],
  function(PlotObject, SVG_File, Width, Height) {
    save_svg_plot(PlotObject, SVG_File, width = Width, height = Height)
  }
)

cat("Saved plot files:\n", paste(plot_files, collapse = "\n"), "\n", sep = "")
## Saved plot files:
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/exclusion_pct_delta_targets.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/exclusion_pct_delta_interactions.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_faceted.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_stacked.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_stacked_split.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_faceted_split.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_terms_split.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_targets_split.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_footprint_interactions_split.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/set_level_mean_targets.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/set_level_median_targets.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/degree_bucket_composition.svg
## D:/Masterarbeit_LOCAL/MetaProViz/MetSigDB_Benchmark/benchmark_results/metsigdb_benchmark_20260410_130645/plots/resource_degree_combined.svg
plot_index_tbl <- plot_manifest %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Plot = Plot,
    SVG_File = basename(plot_files),
    Relative_Path = file.path("plots", SVG_File)
  )
wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()

overview_tbl <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Section, ~Description,
  "Resource_Groups", "Resource-to-group mapping used in this benchmark run.",
  "Exclusion_Compare", "No exclusion vs default exclusion counts and deltas by resource and interaction type.",
  "Resource_Level", "Distinct terms, targets, interactions, and average connectivity metrics.",
  "Set_Level", "Per-resource distribution summary of targets per term.",
  "Degree_Buckets", "Target membership composition across 1 term, 2 terms, and >2 terms.",
  "Plot_Files", "SVG plot files generated for this run."
)

run_info_tbl <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Item, ~Value,
  "Run Timestamp", run_stamp,
  "Output Folder", run_dir,
  "Excel File", excel_file,
  "Plot Folder", plots_dir,
  "Exclusion Mode (main benchmark)", "default_all"
)

openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "Overview")
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Overview", x = run_info_tbl, startRow = 1)
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Overview", x = overview_tbl, startRow = 8)
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Overview", x = plot_index_tbl, startRow = 20)
openxlsx::freezePane(wb, "Overview", firstRow = TRUE)

write_sheet_data(wb, "Resource_Groups", tbl_resource_groups)
write_sheet_data(wb, "Exclusion_Compare", tbl_exclusion_compare)
write_sheet_data(wb, "Resource_Level", tbl_resource_level)
write_sheet_data(wb, "Set_Level", tbl_set_level)
write_sheet_data(wb, "Degree_Buckets", tbl_degree_buckets)

openxlsx::saveWorkbook(wb, excel_file, overwrite = TRUE)

4 Resource grouping

The table below defines how each resource is classified into benchmark groups. This mapping controls aggregation and plot coloring throughout the report.

tbl_resource_groups %>%
  knitr::kable()
Resource Resource Group
metsigdb_chemicalclass Annotation resources
metsigdb_macdb Cancer association resources
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources
metsigdb_hallmarks Derived pathway resources
metsigdb_metalinks Interaction resources
metsigdb_metalinks__enzyme_metabolite Interaction resources
metsigdb_metalinks__other_protein_metabolite Interaction resources
metsigdb_metalinks__receptor_metabolite Interaction resources
metsigdb_metalinks__transporter_metabolite Interaction resources
metsigdb_kegg Pathway resources
metsigdb_reactome Pathway resources
metsigdb_wikipathways Pathway resources

5 Exclusion effect (counts and deltas)

The next table compares counts between no metabolite exclusion and the default exclusion. The most important fields are the signed deltas and percentage deltas, which indicate the exclusion effect magnitude.

knitr::kable(tbl_exclusion_compare, digits = 3)
Resource Resource Group Interaction Type Terms (No Exclusion) Terms (Default Exclusion) Delta Terms Targets (No Exclusion) Targets (Default Exclusion) Delta Targets % Delta Targets Interactions (No Exclusion) Interactions (Default Exclusion) Delta Interactions % Delta Interactions
metsigdb_chemicalclass Annotation resources metabolite-annotation 410 410 0 145845 145820 -25 0.000 145845 145820 -25 0.000
metsigdb_macdb Cancer association resources metabolite-cancer 212 212 0 5407 5404 -3 -0.001 17953 17939 -14 -0.001
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolic_enzyme 96 96 0 1453 1453 0 0.000 1932 1932 0 0.000
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolite 90 90 0 830 822 -8 -0.010 3899 3822 -77 -0.020
metsigdb_hallmarks Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolic_enzyme 50 50 0 4384 4384 0 0.000 7322 7322 0 0.000
metsigdb_hallmarks Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolite 48 48 0 761 753 -8 -0.011 4613 4536 -77 -0.017
metsigdb_metalinks Interaction resources metabolite-protein 4374 3585 -789 1128 1116 -12 -0.011 27314 24500 -2814 -0.103
metsigdb_metalinks__enzyme_metabolite Interaction resources metabolite-protein 918 825 -93 591 584 -7 -0.012 4182 3654 -528 -0.126
metsigdb_metalinks__other_protein_metabolite Interaction resources metabolite-protein 2293 1691 -602 786 777 -9 -0.011 9863 8282 -1581 -0.160
metsigdb_metalinks__receptor_metabolite Interaction resources metabolite-protein 696 671 -25 380 373 -7 -0.018 9827 9558 -269 -0.027
metsigdb_metalinks__transporter_metabolite Interaction resources metabolite-protein 562 481 -81 394 385 -9 -0.023 3526 3067 -459 -0.130
metsigdb_kegg Pathway resources pathway-metabolite 463 452 -11 6612 6586 -26 -0.004 19464 18935 -529 -0.027
metsigdb_reactome Pathway resources pathway-metabolite 20260 19827 -433 3155 3129 -26 -0.008 297041 277313 -19728 -0.066
metsigdb_wikipathways Pathway resources pathway-metabolite 1321 1288 -33 6957 6896 -61 -0.009 16295 15573 -722 -0.044

p_delta_interactions

The table below describes term size distributions. Use mean/median targets per term to compare how broad resources are.

8 Test 3: Target membership buckets

The next table shows how often targets recur across terms. The stacked plot highlights whether resources are dominated by single-term or multi-term targets.

knitr::kable(tbl_degree_buckets, digits = 3)
Resource Resource Group Interaction Type Membership Bucket Number of Targets Share of Targets
metsigdb_chemicalclass Annotation resources metabolite-annotation in 1 term 145820 1.000
metsigdb_macdb Cancer association resources metabolite-cancer in 1 term 3067 0.568
metsigdb_macdb Cancer association resources metabolite-cancer in 2 terms 805 0.149
metsigdb_macdb Cancer association resources metabolite-cancer in >2 terms 1532 0.283
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolic_enzyme in 1 term 1206 0.830
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolic_enzyme in 2 terms 147 0.101
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolic_enzyme in >2 terms 100 0.069
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolite in 1 term 208 0.253
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolite in 2 terms 135 0.164
metsigdb_gaude_pathways Derived pathway resources pathway-metabolite in >2 terms 479 0.583

9 Export summary

The paths below show where all exported artifacts were written for this run.

export_summary_tbl <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Artifact, ~Path,
  "Excel workbook", excel_file,
  "Plot directory", plots_dir
)

knitr::kable(export_summary_tbl)

10 References

Agrawal, A. et al. 2024. “WikiPathways 2024: Next Generation Pathway Database.” Nucleic Acids Research 52: D679–89.
Braisted, J. et al. 2023. “RaMP-DB 2.0: A Renovated Knowledgebase for Deriving Biological and Chemical Insight from Metabolites, Proteins, and Genes.” Bioinformatics 39.
Djoumbou Feunang, Yannick, Roman Eisner, Craig Knox, Leonid Chepelev, Janna Hastings, Gareth Owen, Eoin Fahy, et al. 2016. “ClassyFire: Automated Chemical Classification with a Comprehensive, Computable Taxonomy.” Journal of Cheminformatics 8: 61. https://doi.org/10.1186/s13321-016-0174-y.
Farr, Elias, Daniel Dimitrov, Christina Schmidt, Denes Turei, Sebastian Lobentanzer, Aurelien Dugourd, and Julio Saez-Rodriguez. 2024. “MetaLinksDB: A Flexible and Contextualizable Resource of Metabolite-Protein Interactions.” Briefings in Bioinformatics 25 (4): bbae347. https://doi.org/10.1093/bib/bbae347.
Kanehisa, Minoru, Miho Furumichi, Mao Tanabe, Yoko Sato, and Kanae Morishima. 2017. “KEGG: New Perspectives on Genomes, Pathways, Diseases and Drugs.” Nucleic Acids Research 45: D353–61.
Milacic, Marija et al. 2024. “The Reactome Pathway Knowledgebase 2024.” Nucleic Acids Research.
Sun, Y., X. Zheng, G. Wang, Y. Wang, X. Chen, J. Sun, Z. Xiong, et al. 2023. “MACdb: A Curated Knowledgebase for Metabolic Associations Across Human Cancers.” Molecular Cancer Research 21 (7): 691–97. https://doi.org/10.1158/1541-7786.MCR-22-0909.
Turei, Denes, Albert Valdeolivas, Leyla Gul, Nicolas Palacio-Escat, Michal Klein, Olga Ivanova, Mihaela Olbei, et al. 2021. “Integrated Intra- and Intercellular Signaling Knowledge for Multicellular Omics Analysis.” Molecular Systems Biology 17: e9923. https://doi.org/10.15252/msb.20209923.
